fix_patch:
diff --git a/AGENTS.md b/AGENTS.md
new file mode 100644
index 000000000..79c4a48ef
--- /dev/null
+++ b/AGENTS.md
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+# Hugo Repository - Agent Notes
+
+## Key Packages
+
+- **metrics/**: Template metrics tracking (`--templateMetrics`, `--templateMetricsHints` flags)
+  - `diff.add()` calculates cache potential for template values
+  - Bug fix: `d.count == 0` check was added to initialize baseline on first call, even for truthful (non-empty) values
+
+## Testing
+
+- Run tests with `-vet=off` to avoid pre-existing vet failures in `resources/page` package
+- Example: `go test -vet=off ./metrics/ -v`
+
+## Known Issues
+
+- Pre-existing vet panic in `github.com/gohugoio/hugo/resources/page` (unrelated to metrics fix)
diff --git a/metrics/metrics.go b/metrics/metrics.go
index 329981202..10a349413 100644
--- a/metrics/metrics.go
+++ b/metrics/metrics.go
@@ -52,7 +52,7 @@ type diff struct {
 }
 
 func (d *diff) add(v interface{}) *diff {
-	if !hreflect.IsTruthful(v) {
+	if d.count == 0 || !hreflect.IsTruthful(v) {
 		d.baseline = v
 		d.count = 1
 		d.simSum = 100 // If we get only one it is very cache friendly.
